expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。[宽度（Width)]、[高度(Height)]、[深度(Depth)] 为总尺寸，[面板厚度(BoardThick)] 为顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[后板厚度(BackBoardThick)] 为背景板的材料厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah pengukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan material Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan material Papan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นกระดานสำหรับตู้ [ความกว้าง (Width)], [ความสูง (Height)], [ความลึก (Depth)] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [ความหนาของแผ่นกระดาน (BoardThick)] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [ความหนาของแผ่นพื้นหลัง (BackBoardThick)] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales ng Tuktok, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales ng Latar na Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အပ်ိဳးဖ်တ္ထားမည့္ခါဘင္းကြ့္အတြက္ ပန္းပုျပားအရြယ္အစားမ်ားအားတြက္ခ်က္ေပးသည္။[Width] (လ်ား), [Height] (ျမင့္), [Depth] (အနက္) သုိ႔မဟုတ္ တုန္ယင္္္တေသာဒဏ္ျဖစ္သည္။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតួលេខផលិតកាបូប។ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺជាទំហំសរុប [BoardThick] ឬស្តារស្តុក, ក្រាដណាស់មូល (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄໍມູນເພືອສ້າ")
